zh.speaker: ヤチヨ
zh.message: 八百代们! 我所有的神明们, 今晚玩的开心吗?

en.speaker: ヤチヨ
en.message: Yaoyoro! All my gods and goddesses, are you having a good time tonight

en.speaker: Kaguya
en.message: Hey bitch, she is my girl!

zh.speaker: かぐや
zh.message: 彩叶, 相信我, 我可以的!

zh.speaker: 彩葉
zh.message: 要是你搞砸了, 我就不管你了哦.

en.speaker: Kaguya
en.message: Iroha, trust me, I can do this!

en.speaker: Iroha
en.message: If you screw up, I'll just leave you behind.

zh.speaker: ヤチヨ
zh.message: 我一直期待着, 也许触碰到你时会感到温暖.

zh.speaker: 彩葉
zh.message: 还没有结束, 这个故事还有续集.

en.speaker: Yachiyo
en.message: I keep hoping maybe it'll feel warm when I touch you.

en.speaker: Iroha
en.message: It's not over. There's still more to this story.
